emails.subject: Cal'02, into SOCO offer
emails.body: Cal'02, into SOCO offer Kevin, Any interest if offering an odd block of 30MW, into SOCO, 5x16, Cal'02. Duke Energy is asking? I told him it would be at a premium to our EOL offer for the odd block, if we would sell it at all. Billy Braddock Manager Enron Power Marketing Inc. 713-345-7877 (work) 713-646-4940 (fax) 713-503-2166 (cell)

emails.subject: RE: Cal'02, into SOCO offer
emails.body: RE: Cal'02, into SOCO offer I will show him a 50 MW block. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Cal'02, into SOCO offer
emails.body: Just FYI. They're cleaning up their slop (he's long an odd 20MW block). I told him no offer on the odd block. To: Braddock, Billy
